storyInfo: Sui traps Wang in the cage of memory. Strange things have been happening around the Sui proxies after the appearance of Yu, all pointing to the awakening of Sui. Jie demonstrates the power of the writing knife to Wang, as she seeks a way to eliminate Sui.

attributes.text: The same game of weiqi... one that you have lost countless times over the centuries.
You are trying to fight the whole with its parts... all well-laid plans no more than child's play in my eyes.
Drowning yourself in children's toys. A bad old habit of yours.
This challenge is simply a repetition of the thousands of defeats of the past.

attributes.content: ...Hah.
You try to mask your fear with arrogance.
Why bother?
Anger, fear, hope... I see clearly in you the things you try to see in me.
Join the game, if you're not afraid.
This time...
You WILL lose.
I am defeated.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I did not expect this variation of the offset play.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You had a chance, if you did not continue to cede ground in the center around the hundredth move, hoping for a draw.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I did not have a clear view of the developments to come, so I picked the safe move. I see I was mistaken.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Haha. I thought my weiqi skills had improved, but it looks like I'm still far beneath you.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: In this last battle, we were only able to avoid heavy casualties thanks to your strategy of conserving our strength and luring the enemy deep in.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: This return to the capital is an opportunity for you to rest. But I expect it will be a long time until our next meeting.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You don't seem concerned with victory or defeat.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Why obsess over such things in a meeting between brothers?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Not just weiqi. It seems that nothing ever concerns you; you are always content to act the part of the kind benefactor.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I don't know why you'd say that...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The new Right Assistant Minister of the Ministry of War, together with officials from the Ministry of Rites, accused you in a petition to the throne two months ago.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Commanding troops to act without authorization. A serious crime.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: How do you know the imperial court's business, when you've been with me on the front lines for the past six months?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I have my ways. You should worry about yourself.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: If he meant our late return to camp, it was because we had to stop and wait for a Catastrophe to pass.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: General Yang knew. The Ministry of War hardly has a case.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Oh, you don't need to worry about that.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The Assistant Minister was found to have accepted bribes and embezzled supplies... he is in prison now, awaiting trial.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: He won't spread rumors any longer for now. As for whether he makes it out of prison alive... only Heaven knows.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You promised to stop meddling in the affairs of the court.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: I would hardly call it meddling. Simply helping Yan rid itself of a corrupt official.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You know your own intentions...
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: You see the entire court as a game of weiqi, with human lives for stones?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Has your lust for honesty and righteousness blinded you to the evil and malice lurking in the hearts of people?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: No sooner had that man taken office than he started to target you. Do you really think there is no one behind the curtain? Do you really believe we have only one enemy?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Go easy on this one, and we set ourselves up for more trouble to come.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Strange things have been happening since the birth of our youngest brother.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Fāng's patient committed suicide after getting better.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Someone has been producing 'satirical' works of falsehood in Dusk's name, imitating her touch.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Thieves have stolen treasures from Yi's garden. A long and thorough investigation by the Judicial Review Office turned up nothing more than a gang of fools.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: And then, your matter.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We all know... It is not dead.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The people here have never forgotten Its terror. That is why they watch our every move, every meeting.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Do you still think your little achievements will force them to see us as anything more than alien entities, enemies to be feared?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Are Fāng and Dusk alright?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Fāng was depressed for a while. Dusk has always been how she is. But I don't suppose either would worry too much about it.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: But what about the future?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You think someone is pulling the strings behind the scenes?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The Shanhaizhong, or someone else with ulterior motives?
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: That's what I truly fear.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: If a single mastermind is behind all of this...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I cannot determine who it might be, nor do I have any inkling of their intentions.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I will confirm all that you've said with the Sui Regulator.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: ...I know you have good intentions.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: But don't overstep the boundaries like this again.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Since when have we been worried for one another?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I simply didn't want to fall into a trap without knowing who dug it.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: It's time to go.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: The journey is far. Be careful on your way.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: Bring the others my greetings.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: ...I may not see them.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: *sigh*.
attributes.name: Shuo

attributes.content: The proxy bids his sibling farewell and proceeds in the direction of the capital.
The journey is far, and he is in a hurry. He does not have time to stop for small noises along the way.
One wrong move...
And all is lost...
Let's begin with the name 'Yu', shall we?
Sure. Let me think...
Yu Yin Rao Liang.' The sound lingers upon the beams.
Liang. Liang...
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: ...What idiom begins with 'Liang'?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Don't tell me you're giving up already.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: O-Of course not. Just busy with the beastmeat. Give me some time.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Sure... I have many books to copy. Take your time.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Liang... I feel like I should ask Yi, but he's not here...
attributes.name: Yu
Yu
attributes.content: Heng Liang'—crossbeam. 'Fang Liang'—roof beam. 'Dong Liang'—pillar. I know! 'Dong Liang Zhi Cai,' pillar of society!

attributes.name: Yu
attributes.content: Wait, it has to start with Liang...
(Say, she has so many bamboo slips with words on them sitting next to her. Maybe if I took a peek...)
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: What is it?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: —N-Nothing.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Why are you copying the words from the slips onto these... squares?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: It's called 'paper'. A new invention.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: It's lighter and easier to write on than bamboo. It also doesn't deteriorate easily, which makes it easy to preserve.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: You can preserve something forever, if you write it on paper?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Yes and no.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Bamboo slips may last for decades, paper for centuries.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Be it bamboo or paper, however, there ultimately comes a day when it perishes.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: No matter what we use to record something, it will only endure forever if people truly commit it to memory.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Just like how people remember your cooking when they taste it.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: He listens, but it is unclear if he understands. He scratches his head beside the stockbeast that he has just butchered, but he cannot come up with an idiom that starts with 'Liang'.
Suddenly, a small piece of bamboo falls in front of him, and he sees the words on it.
Liang Shang Jun Zi'—man on the roof beam!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Not bad. 'Zi', eh? Let me think... 'Zi Xu—'
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Let's stop here. This word chain game is so hard. Why don't you play it with Ling and Dusk the next time they're here, and I'll watch from the sidelines.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Are you hungry? Do you want me to cook the meat?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Sure.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Can I have the bamboo slips, if you don't need them anymore?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: For the fire? I suppose...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: The young proxy takes the bamboo slips from his sister and skillfully cuts them down the middle...
Into long, sharp sticks.
What are you making?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Meat skewers!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: This stockbeast tenderloin is just the right mix of lean and fat, and the fat on its belly is nice and firm. It'll taste great roasted.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: The fuel has to be charcoal. These bamboo slips don't burn for long.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I already have the charcoal. We can start roasting when I'm done cutting the slips and skewering the meat.
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Hah... does grilling meat on bamboo slips make this a scholar's meal?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Let's call it 'scholar's barbecue'!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Well, I trust your cooking. I'm excited to try it.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Well, I'm done with the slips. You can take them.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: You're both here.
Oh... back already?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Huh...?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Wang?
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I got your letter. I thought you wouldn't be here for a few more days, at least.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Smooth trip?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Yes.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: You two...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: There's the idiom 'burning a guqin to cook a fowlbeast,' which means sacrilegious, wasteful behavior.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What are you doing with these bamboo slips?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I-I'm not...
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: Jie gave them to me...
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: The boy hides behind his sister, peeking his head out from her side.
Just giving some broken bamboo slips to Yu to make the most of them. Why so harsh?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: You should be more grateful to Yu for making dinner.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: It's not like I actually said anything...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Don't fight, don't fight!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: I'll go make dinner! It's not every day my second-oldest brother comes back. We finally get to eat together!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: You, just, er, sit down and chat!
attributes.name: Yu

attributes.content: *sigh*...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: He's always been a little afraid of you. Can't you be more gentle?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Are things not going well?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: No.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I see...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: But we don't get together very often, and Yu misses you.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Anything you want to say can wait until after dinner.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: So, unsettling things have been happening without my knowledge.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: You don't look worried at all.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I'm worried... and I'm just surprised that you show so much concern for your siblings, brother.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Siblings in the sense that we were born from the same fragmented consciousness. Not true blood relations.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We each have our own interests and ambitions. Our fates are none of each other's concern... we walk different paths.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Do you truly think so?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: My views are different.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: See, it's been centuries since we came to the mortal world. Even if we are not truly part of it, most of the scenes and people that we see are lovely.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: But the people we meet seem to become smoke in the wind in the blink of an eye.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: In the end, it is only 'us' who remain, and it's only in each other that we can truly speak our hearts.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: We may have differences and we may have conflicts, but we could never cut each other off completely... isn't that very much like human siblings?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I have no intention of arguing, if this is how you think.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: *sigh*... I don't know why you always seem so aloof. We don't see each other very often. Are you not happy at all?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I wonder if you'd regret it, if one of us suddenly disappeared forever.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Speaking of which, I encountered something strange recently.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: One night, I was about to go to bed when I heard a sound from the study.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: From the garden, I saw through the window the silhouette of someone bending over the desk, writing something.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I hurried into the study to find no one, only the Jijiuzhang that I had been transcribing the past few days lying on the desk, with scribblings all over it...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Jie takes a scroll from the desk.
One word is written over every neatly written character on the page.
Who do you think could have done it?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: There is only one possibility.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: It is awakening, and It is attempting to interfere with us in some way.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: We thought Its consciousness had completely faded after Yu's birth.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: But It is alive... still sleeping, but the stuff of our nightmares.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: If It does wake, we will become Its fleeting dream...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: What do you have in mind?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I don't know yet. But I'll think of a way...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I have an idea, if you'd care to listen.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I only recently thought about it... when I compiled the histories with the people of Yan, there were inevitably some mistakes, no matter how careful we were.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Unlike ordinary writing, it takes great effort to correct mistakes written in the histories.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Jie picks up a writing knife from the desk, used to scrape bamboo slips, then picks up a scroll, and gently scrapes the paper.

The ink that has seeped into the paper, even smearing the next page slightly, disappears without a trace when the writing knife touches it. The paper is blank, as though nothing has ever been written on it.
This knife...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I think my influence has changed it.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I have a faint feeling that the words it scrapes away—a history, or at least... a name—don't just disappear from the paper; they disappear from people's hearts and minds.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Perhaps there will come a day when we use it to scrape the word 'Sui' from all the texts of this world.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: You can... do that?
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Not yet. Right now, it's only a writing knife, albeit an unusual one.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: But I can feel it. The more words written, the heavier my knife and pen become.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Perhaps we're all the same. We discovered the answer to who we are in that primordial void, then we understood the meaning of our existence in the mortal realm. This is what proves we are different from It.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Perhaps there will come a day when our strength exceeds Its. Then, we can truly break free of Its influence, and live as 'ourselves'.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: As long as we don't forget who we are, of course.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: What are you thinking on, brother?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Don't worry about it.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: *sigh*... Sometimes I feel like you and I are the least compatible, amongst our siblings.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Plots and plans are things to be kept inside one's heart, but words and language are for expressing what lies in one's heart.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: But sometimes I feel like you hide nothing from me, that I can see all that you think.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Interesting, isn't it? We both found what we wanted to devote ourselves to, only to have it reshape our personalities in return.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Shu always says I'm obsessed with the past. And I remember the deathly white that she talked about, which lies at the end of the future.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: She was right. One cannot pretend to be carefree, when there are things that one cannot let go of.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I know you're worried about the unknowable future... victory and defeat are what you're most obsessed about, but it would be such a miserable existence, if there was nothing but victory and defeat.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Besides that, what is it you care about the most?
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: I do not obsess about victory and defeat. I simply...
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: I simply do not like to accept that a game could not be won.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Hm...
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: By the way, are you reporting to the Sui Regulator tomorrow? Could you take these copied books with you? They'll need to review them before they can be archived in the Sky Mirror Pavilion.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Very well.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: And take another look at the re-copied Jijiuzhang for me. Bring the writing knife too, so you can correct any mistakes.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: Anything you've written hardly needs me to check it.
attributes.name: Wang

attributes.content: Consider it an activity to pass the time.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: You spend so much time devising military strategies, thinking of victory and defeat. A distraction would do you good.
attributes.name: Jie

attributes.content: And perhaps, you might find what you're looking for in the text.
attributes.name: Jie
